title_en: United Conservative Party wins Alberta provincial election
title_fr: Le Parti conservateur uni remporte les élections provinciales de l'Alberta
description_en: The UCP wins a majority in the Alberta general election, ending the NDP government that had held office since 2015.
verification_notes: Attach Elections Alberta official result (Tier 1) and CBC election-night source.

update_log.change: Added R-107 (Elections Alberta 2019 official results PDF). Sourcing resolved.
